name: visualization-r
description: Editable R/ggplot2 visualization support for static publication-style figures.

interface.shortDescription: 56 editable R/ggplot2 figure templates for scatter, bar, distribution, heatmap, and line plots
interface.longDescription: Provides table-driven R/ggplot2 visualization templates that export PNG, PDF, and editable R scripts. The current bundle supports scatter-style figures (basic scatter, beeswarm, bezier pair, Cleveland, group beeswarm, embedding, quadrant, bubble, dumbbell, rect dumbbell, diagonal, correlation, PCA score, volcano, MA, enrichment dot), distribution plots (band boxplot, bezier point boxplot, boxplot, DE boxplot, facet boxplot, two-group boxplot, paired boxplot, polar heatmap, polar violin, violin, raincloud-style, vertical raincloud, differential raincloud), bar charts (basic, butterfly, diverging, enrich groups, enrich points, gene terms, grouped, pathway expand, radial, radial groups, ranked lollipop, stacked percent, waffle, waterfall), heatmaps (basic, clustered, correlation, shape-overlay, significance, split, split shape, Mantel heatmap, Mantel size), and line plots (grouped, time series, GSEA curve, survival curve).
defaultPrompt: Use visualization-r to create an editable static figure.
